_comment: Copy this file to bindings/<your-project>.json, remove _comment fields if desired, and replace every placeholder with a representative symbol from your Kotlin workspace.

SEALED_HIERARCHY._comment: A sealed interface/class with multiple implementations.
SEALED_HIERARCHY.description: Why this hierarchy proves semantic subtype discovery

DISAMBIGUATE_MEMBER._comment: A member name that appears on unrelated types.
DISAMBIGUATE_MEMBER.description: Why raw text search would over-match

CROSS_MODULE_CLASS._comment: A type referenced from more than one module.
CROSS_MODULE_CLASS.description: Why this proves cross-module reference coverage

OVERLOADED_OR_COMMON_FUNCTION._comment: A common function name that needs containingType or fileHint.
OVERLOADED_OR_COMMON_FUNCTION.description: Why this proves disambiguated caller tracing

RENAME_TARGET._comment: A symbol with references/imports in multiple files.
RENAME_TARGET.description: Why this rename proves safe multi-file mutation

LARGE_CLASS._comment: A large class where scaffold should be cheaper than raw reads.

MODULE_LIST._comment: The modules expected in workspace discovery output.
MODULE_LIST.description: The modules in the target project
